prompt: Mock up the Tasks app in card (Dig) view as a single self-contained HTML file: org 360iSuite, Tasks tab active, left views pane with Responsible member counts, toolbar with 3 filters / 134 of 745 / Show all / Sheet active / Add Task, and a 3-across grid of 6 task cards with grey excerpt blocks, category chips, and date+comments footers.
assertions: Primary action button uses Podio teal #15808D
Active view toggle is the Podio orange pill #F7A11C
Uses the Podio pastel chip palette (3+ token pairs from tokens.md)
No blue primary color (blue-600 / #2563EB family absent)
